common.commonDashboardAllowToolTip: Only include specific Paneles por providing the name de a Dashboard, o a Regular Expression (REGEX). If not provided, Todos Paneles will be included.
common.commonDashboardDenyToolTip: Exclude specific Paneles por providing the name de a Dashboard, o a Regular Expression (REGEX). If not provided, Todos Paneles will be included. Deny patterns always take precendence over Allow patterns.
common.commonDatabasesAllowToolTip: Only include specific Bases de datos por providing the name de a Database, o a Regular Expression (REGEX). If not provided, Todos Bases de datos will be included.
common.commonDatabasesDenyToolTip: Exclude specific Bases de datos por providing the name de a Database, o a Regular Expression (REGEX). If not provided, Todos Bases de datos will be included. Deny patterns always take precedence over Allow patterns.
common.commonEnableColumnProfilingToolTip: Generate Datos Profiles para the Columnas en extracted Tables. Enabling this may increase the duration de the extraction process.
common.commonEnableStatefulIngestionToolTip: Eliminar stale assets de DataHub once they have been Eliminado en the ingestion source.
common.commonEnableTableProfilingToolTip: Generate Datos Profiles para extracted Tables. Enabling this may increase the duration de the extraction process.
common.commonExtractOwnersToolTip: When enabled, extracts ownership de Looker directly. When disabled, ownership is left empty para Paneles y charts.
common.commonExtractUsageHistoryToolTip: Experimental (Subject para breaking change) -- Whether para ingest usage statistics para dashboards. Setting this para True will Consulta looker system activity explores para fetch historical Panel usage.
common.commonGithubRepoToolTip: Name de your github repo. e.g. repo para https://github.com/datahub-project/datahub is datahub-project/datahub.
common.commonIncludeLineageToolTip: Include Tabla y Ver Linaje en your ingestion.
common.commonIncludeTableLineageToolTip: Extract Tabel-Level Linaje metadata. Enabling this may increase the duration de the extraction process.
common.commonIncludeUpstreamLineageInReportTool: Useful para debugging Linaje information. Set para True para see the raw Linaje created internally.
common.commonIngestOwnerToolTip: Ingest Propietario de source. Be careful: This cah override Propietarios added por Usuarios de DataHub.
common.commonIngestTagsToolTip: Ingest Etiquetas de the source. Be careful: This can override Etiquetas entered por Usuarios de DataHub.
common.commonSchemaAllowToolTip: Only include specific Esquemas por providing the name de a Schema, o a Regular Expression (REGEX) para include specific Schemas. If not provided, Todos Esquemas inside allowed Bases de datos will be included.
common.commonSchemaDenyToolTip: Exclude specific Esquemas por providing the name de a Schema, o a Regular Expression (REGEX). If not provided, Todos Esquemas inside allowed Bases de datos will be included. Deny patterns always take precedence over Allow patterns.
common.commonSkipPersonalFoldersToolTip: Whether para skip ingestion de Paneles en personal folders. Setting this para True will only ingest Paneles en the Compartido folder space.
common.commonStartTimeToolTip: Earliest date used when processing audit logs para lineage, usage, y more. Default: Last full Día en UTC o last time DataHub ingested usage (if stateful ingestion is enabled). Tip: Set this para an older date (e.g. 1 Mes ago) para bootstrap your first ingestion run, y then reduce para subsequent runs. Changing this may increase the duration de the extraction process.
common.commonTableAllowToolTip: Only include Tablas con particular names por providing the fully qualified name de a Table, o a Regular Expression (REGEX). If not provided, Todos Tablas inside allowed Bases de datos y Esquemas will be included en ingestion.
common.commonTableDenyToolTip: Exclude Tablas con particular names por providing the fully qualified name de a Table, o a Regular Expression (REGEX). If not provided, Todos Tablas inside allowed Bases de datos y Esquemas will be included en ingestion. Deny patterns always take precedence over Allow patterns.
common.commonTableLineageModeToolTip: Which Tabla Linaje collector mode para use. Check out the documentation explaining the difference between the three Disponible modes.
common.commonViewAllowToolTip: Only include Views con particular names por providing the fully qualified name de a View, o a Regular Expression (REGEX). If not provided, Todos Views inside allowed Bases de datos y Esquemas will be included en ingestion.
common.commonViewDenyToolTip: Exclude Views con particular names por providing the fully qualified name de a View, o a Regular Expression (REGEX). Término Grupos act as folders, containing Términos y nested Término Groups. para example, there could be a PII Término Grupo containing Términos para different types de PII, such as Email o Phone Number. entityProfile.glossaryTerm_component: You can Ver y Agregar Glosario Términos para this asset here. Glosario Términos are structured, standarized labels para organizing your mission-critical data. para example, if you're marking assets containing PII fields, you might Agregar the Término Email. Learn Más about Glosario Términos here.

entityProfile.tags_component: You can Ver y Agregar Etiquetas para this asset here. Etiquetas are labels para organizing your data. para example, you can Agregar a Etiqueta para mark an asset as Mission Critical. Learn Más about Etiquetas here.

groups.createGroups_component: Click here para Crear a Nuevo Group.
groups.groupsIntro_component: Welcome para Datahub Groups! Grupos are collections de Usuarios which can be used para assign ownership para assets y manage access. Grupos can be created natively within DataHub, o synced de your Identity Provider. Learn Más about Grupos here.

homePage.domains_component: Here are your organization's Domains. Dominios are collections de Datos assets - such as Tables, Dashboards, y ML Models - that make it easy para discover information relevant para a particular part de your organization.
homePage.ingestion_component: Start integrating your Datos sources immediately por navigating para the Ingestion page.
homePage.platforms_component: Here are your organization's Datos Platforms. Datos Platforms represent specific third-party Datos Systems o Tools. Examples include Datos Warehouses like Snowflake, Orchestrators like Airflow, y Dashboarding tools like Looker.
homePage.searchBar_component: This is the Buscar Bar. It will serve as your launch point para discovering y collaborating around the Datos most important para you. Not sure where para start? Click on Explore All!

welcomeParaph.intro_component: DataHub helps you discover y organize the important Datos within your organization. You can:

ingestion.ingestionCreate_component: Configure Nuevo Integrations de DataHub para your Datos Platforms, including Transactional Bases de datos like MySQL, Datos Warehouses such as Snowflake, Dashboarding tools like Looker, y more! Learn Más about ingestion y Ver the full list de supported Integrations here.
ingestion.ingestionRefreshSource_component: Click para force a Actualizar de running ingestion sources.

lineageGraph.introLineageGraph_component: You can Ver the Linaje Graph para an entity on this page. Datos Linaje allows you para visualize y understand both the upstream dependencies y downstream consumers de this entity. Learn Más about Linaje here.

policies.createPolicies_component: Click here para Crear a Nuevo Policy.
policies.introPolicies_component: Welcome para DataHub Policies! en most cases, Roles are the best option para granting privileges para DataHub users. When Más fine-grained control over Usuario y Grupo Permisos is required, then Políticas will do the trick. Learn Más about Políticas here.

roles.introID_component: Welcome para DataHub Roles! Roles are the recommended way para manage Permisos on DataHub. DataHub currently supports three out-of-the-box Roles: Admin, Editor y Reader. Learn Más about Roles y the different Permisos para each Rol here.
